title: SEELEs plans for the Evangelions during 3I
display_title: SEELEs plans for the Evangelions during 3I
wikitext:
[]: SEELE's plans for the Evangelions during 3I             Quote Post by Replicator » Wed Jan 30, 2013 8:44 pm According to the EvaWiki, the ultimate purpose for the Evas was to initiate 3I, but how exactly would the original plan have been? I'll give a run-down of the Eva Units and their fate before EoE. EVA-00: Prototype. Destroyed in Episode 23. EVA-01: Produced as a substitute for Lilith. (And later gains an S2... see below) EVA-02: Production Model. Destroyed in EoE. What use would it have been to SEELE for 3I, when their MP Evas took no hesitation to destroy it? EVA-03: Production Model. Became Bardiel's host body, and destroyed in Episode 18. EVA-04: S2 prototype? Destroyed during an accident. EVA-05-13: MP Evas. Equipped with S2 Engines, and were used during the actual 3I scenario. It's hard to tell what were the intentions for Unit-00, Unit-02, and Unit-03 after the Angels were defeated, as there are no features that would seem to be prerequisites for 3I (S2 Engine and Fruit of Wisdom). Unit-01 is the special case, as it was seemingly created to act as a substitute for Lilith. We see this during EoE, but there does seem to be hesitation of SEELE's end if the plans will actually work out. Gendo bypasses the Evas altogether and his preferred scenario was to fuse the complete forms of Adam and Lilith. My guess is that SEELE planned produce Unit-01 specifically because they were afraid all along that Gendo would tamper with the Seeds. It should also be noted that Unit-01 gains an S2 Engine later, so could it have initiated 3I on its own? The S2 Engine equipped Evas appear to be the critical component of any possible version of 3I. It's possible that the only Units to actually participate during 3I would have been the ones with S2 Engines, but during EoE, SEELE says that they have fewer Units than planned, which could also mean something else?

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Wed Jan 30, 2013 8:46 pm It's possible that the only Units to actually participate during 3I would have been the ones with S2 Engines, but during EoE, SEELE says that they have fewer Units than planned, which could also mean something else?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:28 pm The main function of the Evangelions was to get rid of all opposition to the plan. Aside from the MP Evas and Unit 01, the rest were expendable by that point, which is why Unit 02 was destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Feb 01, 2013 10:01 am SEELE refer to Eva-02 specifically as "That loathsome Evangelion", so by that point it seems it was pretty much expendable. Eva-01 was probably created to replace Lilith in case anything happened to the Seeds or the Spear of Longinus, and ended up serving as Lilith's substitute because Rei threw the Spear to the Moon. Eva-01 was probably never meant to gain an S2 Engine the way she did, as possessing both a Fruit of Life (S2 Engine) and Fruit of Knowledge (Shinji as the pilot, as well as Yui's soul directing the Eva) would make it an equal being to Lilith and make it harder to control. The many different Evangelions before the MP Evas were probably created so SEELE would be able to destroy all the Angels even if a few Evas were destroyed or critically damaged in battle. Eva-04 was a testbed for the S2 Engine, although I'm not sure whether it would actually have gone into active service at Tokyo-3 if it had worked.
